== Sources ==
<!--
--------------------------------------
------RARITY----NEEDS TO BE UPDATED FOR SLAY THE SPIRE 2
--------------------------------------
MERGE THESE AS NECESSARY BELOW, EXAMPLE, EVENTS WITH EVENTS.

IF YOUR RELIC IS COMMON:
* {{R|Matryoshka}}'s extra relic has a 25% chance of being {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon}} and 75% chance of being {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common}}.

IF YOUR RELIC IS UNCOMMON:
* {{E|The Colosseum}}'s {{Frame|VICTORY}} option drops 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon}} relic and 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare}} relic.
* {{R|Matryoshka}}'s extra relic has a 25% chance of being {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon}} and 75% chance of being {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common}}.

IF YOUR RELIC IS RARE:
* {{E|The Colosseum}}'s {{Frame|VICTORY}} option drops 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon}} relic and 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare}} relic.
* {{E|Mind Bloom}}'s {{Frame|I Am War}} option can drop {{R|RELICNAME}}.
* {{E|Mysterious Sphere}}'s {{Frame|Open Sphere}} option can drop {{R|RELICNAME}}.

--------------------------------------
------TYPE----ALSO NEEDS TO BE UPDATED
--------------------------------------

IF YOUR RELIC IS A SHOP RELIC:
Can only be bought from the {{2|Merchant}}. Only 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} is available per '''Shop''', even with {{R|The Courier||2}}, since it cannot restock Shop Relics.

IF YOUR RELIC IS AN EVENT RELIC:
Can only be obtained from {{E|EVENTNAME||2}}, by selecting the {{Frame|OPTION}} option.

(If this has multiple steps to obtain the relic (the 3 books off the top of my head), mention all steps.)

IF YOUR RELIC IS AN ANCIENT RELIC:
After fighting a {{2|Bosses|Boss}}, can be offered by (LINK TO ANCIENT).

IF YOUR RELIC IS A STARTER UPGRADE:
Can only be obtained as an offering from {{2|Orobas}}.

OTHERWISE FOR NORMAL RELICS:
* (NORMAL RELICS) Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} (REMOVE IF IT HAS A SHOP RESTRICTION) or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.

* (NOT FOR WHETSTONE) Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.
* (FOR WHETSTONE) Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions==
<!--
Find out what restrictions your relic has, at Relics#Restrictions.

IF YOUR RELIC HAS NO SPAWN RESTRICTIONS, AND ISN'T AN EVENT RELIC, SHOP RELIC OR BOSS RELIC:
No spawn restrictions.

Remove this section entirely if it's one of those 3.

---------
OTHERWISE UNCOMMENT BELOW AS NECESSARY, IN BULLET POINTS IF THERE'S MORE THAN 1 RESTRICTION:
---------

IF YOUR RELIC IS CHARACTER EXCLUSIVE:
Can only be obtained by {{2|CHARACTERNAME}}.

IF YOUR RELIC HAS FLOOR RESTRICTIONS:
Can only be obtained below floor X.

IF YOUR RELIC HAS SHOP RESTRICTIONS:
Cannot be bought from the {{2|Merchant}}.

IF YOUR RELIC IS WHETSTONE (NOT WAR PAINT):
Cannot be obtained from Calling Bell and "Obtain Relic" events, that drop the relic without it being a combat reward. This means, for example, {{R|RELICNAME||2}} can be obtained from {{E|Dead Adventurer}} if the Elite is beaten, but cannot be obtained if it is found from the {{Frame|Search}} option.

IF IT'S SHOVEL or GIRYA:
* {{R|Black Star}}'s extra relic can never drop {{R|RELICNAME||2}}.

IF YOUR RELIC IS COMMON:
* Can never be dropped by {{E|The Colosseum}}.
* Can never be dropped by a '''Large Chest'''.

IF YOUR RELIC IS RARE:
* Can never be dropped by {{R|Matryoshka}}'s extra relic.
* Can never be dropped by a '''Small Chest'''.

(TODO: DOCUMENT HOW CHESTS WORK IN STS2)
-->
